title: amauropelta malangae
intro: Amauropelta malangae, also known as Malange fern, is a species of fern found in the Malange region of Angola. It has been found to have medicinal properties, with its rhizomes and leaves used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Amauropelta malangae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in folk medicine to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
